entries.raw_en:
ent-ActionSummonSimiansIII =
    .desc = This spell reaches deep into the elemental plane of bananas (the monkey one, not the clown one), and summons lesser monkeys and gorillas in front of you that will promptly flip out and attack everything in sight. Fun!

ent-ActionSummonSimiansIV =
    .desc = This spell reaches deep into the elemental plane of bananas (the monkey one, not the clown one), and summons lesser monkeys and gorillas in front of you that will promptly flip out and attack everything in sight. Fun!

    .desc = This spell reaches deep into the elemental plane of bananas (the monkey one, not the clown one), and summons lesser monkeys and gorillas in front of you that will promptly flip out and attack everything in sight. Fun!

ent-MindRoleBlob =
    .desc = Mind Role entity

ent-OrganYowieStomach =
    .desc = Gross. This is hard to stomach.

ent-OrganYowieLiver =
    .desc = Pairing suggestion: chianti and fava beans.

ent-OrganYowieHeart =
    .desc = I feel bad for the heartless bastard who lost this.

ent-ThrowingStarChangeling =
    .desc = An ancient weapon still used to this day, due to its ease of lodging itself into its victim's body parts.

ent-ClothingHeadsetAltSyndicateCommander =
    .desc = An updated, modular syndicate intercom that fits over the head and takes encryption keys (there are 5 key slots.).

    .desc = An updated, modular intercom that fits over the head. Takes encryption keys.

ent-ClothingMaskClownUnremoveable =
    .desc = A true prankster's facial attire. A clown is incomplete without his wig and mask.

ent-ClothingOuterCoatRDPurpleOpened =
    .desc = Woven with top of the line technology, this labcoat helps protect against radiation in similar way to the experimental hardsuit.
